qa_pair.question: In this Defold project, the main collection contains one embedded game object instance. A script component is attached to it. What is the id of that embedded instance?
The instance with id "player" in the project's main collection references a game object prototype file. What is the file name of that prototype, without its directory path?
Among the script files in this project, one declares script properties via go.property. How many go.property definitions does it contain?
The player script in this project requires exactly one Lua module. What is the dotted module name passed to require?
Besides "damage", what other message id does the on_message function of /main/player.script compare against?
Exactly one project file references /main/player.script. Considering only its file name without directories, which file is it?
What display width does this project's game.project configure?
According to the Defold 1.12.4 Lua API reference, how many parameters does go.animate accept in total, including optional ones?
According to the Defold 1.12.4 Lua API reference, timer.delay returns a single value. What is the name of that return value?
In the Defold 1.12.4 API reference, the sys namespace documents a message that shows or hides the on-screen profiler. What is the exact message name?
